summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cartons feature and Raw Materials display fix. All backend tests (9/9 passed) and frontend UI verification successful.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Thriller 1L now has 11 cartons from tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cartons feature fully functional. Raw materials display fixed - no longer filtered by hardcoded names. All 12+ raw materials showing on owner dashboard.

owner_dashboard_cartons_column.details: Finished Goods table shows 4 columns: Product, Factory, Car, Cartons. Cartons displayed in pink color. Thriller 1L shows 11 cartons.

owner_dashboard_raw_materials.details: Raw Material Stock section shows ALL raw materials (12 verified): Lubricanting Oil, Base oil 150, VI, Polymer, PPD, Dye, Additive 4T, Additive CH4, CMC, Soda Nitrate, Soda Nitrite, Boric Acid. No hardcoded filtering.

manager_add_cartons_button.details: Factory Actions page shows 'Add Cartons' button (brown background) with icon and description 'Record carton packaging for finished products'

manager_add_cartons_modal.details: Add Cartons modal has: Select Product dropdown (shows current carton count), Number of Cartons input, Confirm button

manager_pack_goods_cartons_input.details: Pack Finished Goods modal has optional 'Cartons (optional)' input field with placeholder 'Number of cartons packed'

api_add_cartons_endpoint.details: POST /api/manager/add-cartons works correctly. Manager can add cartons, data persists to DB.

api_add_cartons_access_control.details: Owner role gets 403 Forbidden when calling POST /api/manager/add-cartons - only manager can add cartons.

api_pack_finished_goods_cartons_param.details: POST /api/manager/pack-finished-goods accepts optional 'cartons' parameter and updates carton_stock.

api_finished_products_carton_stock.details: GET /api/stock/finished-products returns carton_stock field for all products (integer, defaults to 0).
